title: Seafood Menu Dark Green Scattered Premium
source_attribution: Generic premium seafood menu poster (AI-aided design study)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: White sans display section + small tracked caps body + dark bg
composition_summary: Scattered dishes em 5 zones · 3 section labels grouping
why_good: Dark green deep bg = Verde Tejo Só Rio direct match, mais saturado
White display + tracked caps small body = Só Rio typography language exato
Multiple sections (Seafood Menu / Past Menu / Reaffont Mens) com headers + body curtos = EXCELLENT structure for F05b sectioned menu
Plate variety (top-down full + small bowls + sauce dishes) = real menu curation
Sage parsley accent bottom-right = natural ornament consistent com Só Rio palette
caveats: Text garbled (AI artefact). Substituir por 'Menu Pico da Estação' e 'Mesa do Chef' para se transformar em referência canónica Só Rio absoluta
